author: y4rr
content: Result: Added 5 GPU PTX kernels for cumulative scan ops. cumsum/cumprod/logcumsumexp use single-output kernels. cummax/cummin use two-output kernels writing both values AND argmax/argmin indices (as f32) to separate GPU buffers — fully on-device, no CPU roundtrip for index computation. All dispatch wired through GpuBackend trait, CudaBackendImpl overrides, and ops/cumulative.rs GPU fast paths. All 3200+ tests pass.
